subcodes.first_line: When I contemplate, O my God, the relationship that bindeth me to Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی اذا انظر الی نسبتی الیک احب بان اقول فی کل شیء بانی انا الله و اذا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @knowledge of self
